title: aster brevilingulatus
intro: Aster brevilingulatus, also known as the short-rayed aster, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the aster family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Aster brevilingulatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate stomach pain, and soothe digestive issues. Aster brevilingulatus is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
